meaning: vi.有益于,有帮助,有用,有利vt.有利于n.效用,利益
examples: The doctors tried everything to keep him alive but to no avail.
His efforts were to no avail.
Your ability to argue is of little avail if the facts are wrong.
It was in Terminal 1 where I decided to avail myself of a pedicure.
He has tried Flonase and over-the-counter medicines like Claritin to little or no avail.
